name: TrueLayer
description: MCP server for TrueLayer open banking Data API - connect UK/EU bank accounts and cards, fetch balances, transactions, direct debits, standing orders, and account-holder identity. Self-serve Console signup with a free sandbox.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: TrueLayer Data API access_token obtained after a user authorizes a bank connection (exchange the auth-code via the exchange_token tool). Access tokens are short-lived; use refresh_token to renew.

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Client ID
credential_fields.description: TrueLayer Console client_id (create an app at console.truelayer.com).

tools.name: exchange_token
tools.description: Exchange an authorization code (from the bank-connection redirect) for an access_token and refresh_token. Runs against auth.truelayer.com.

client_id.description: Your TrueLayer client_id (uses credential if omitted)

client_secret.description: Your TrueLayer client_secret (uses credential if omitted)

code.description: The authorization code returned to your redirect_uri

redirect_uri.description: The redirect_uri registered with your TrueLayer app

tools.name: refresh_token
tools.description: Renew an expired access_token using a refresh_token. Runs against auth.truelayer.com.

client_id.description: Your TrueLayer client_id (uses credential if omitted)

client_secret.description: Your TrueLayer client_secret (uses credential if omitted)

refresh_token.description: The refresh_token from a previous exchange_token call

tools.name: get_connection_metadata
tools.description: Get metadata about the current connection: provider, granted scopes, consent status, and credentials_id.

tools.name: get_identity
tools.description: Get account-holder identity information (full name, emails, phone numbers, addresses) as reported by the bank.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all bank accounts the user has connected. Returns account_id, display name, account type, currency, and account numbers (IBAN, sort code).

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Get details for a single connected bank account by account_id.

tools.name: get_account_balance
tools.description: Get the current and available balance for a connected bank account.

tools.name: get_account_transactions
tools.description: Get settled transactions for a connected bank account over a date range. Returns amount, currency, description, merchant, category, and running balance.

tools.name: get_pending_transactions
tools.description: Get pending (not yet settled) transactions for a connected bank account.

tools.name: get_direct_debits
tools.description: Get direct debits set up on a connected bank account, including the payee and status.

tools.name: get_standing_orders
tools.description: Get standing orders (recurring scheduled payments) on a connected bank account.

tools.name: list_cards
tools.description: List all credit/debit cards the user has connected. Returns account_id, card network, partial card number, and currency.

tools.name: get_card_balance
tools.description: Get the current balance, available credit, and credit limit for a connected card.

tools.name: get_card_transactions
tools.description: Get settled transactions for a connected card over a date range.
